segments.text: this is the most common way that you're punishing yourself 101 essays to change the way that you think and it talks about mind reading you assume to know
what people are feeling and why they act the way they do especially when it comes to how they feel about you this is usually due to your own projections and
biases you can only comprehend that people feel the way you would and respond the way you do to a certain
situation simply because you aren't familiar with anything else remember you don't always have to know why somebody
said or did something whenever you assume that this is what somebody else is thinking about me you have to keep in mind that this is just your perspective
and this is what you're projecting on to somebody else just because you would respond to the same situation in this way does not mean that they also respond
to the same situation in the exact same manner you have to give yourself the benefit of Doubt for not knowing the 10,000 other perspectives that human
beings might have think about it
